title: FrontierMC
description: An modpack with a healthy balance of magic, tech, and freedom HOORAH
body:
Kinetic hosting has cheap prices but insane quality, their support is some of the best i've dealt with, and their panel is intuitive to use, if you're looking for cheap, yet reliable hosting, please give them a look sign up/purchase kinetic hosting by clicking the image below [![discord-plural](https://www.kinetichosting.net/logo-2022-light.webp)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=129)

**The official modpack for frontierMC, featuring origins, boundless magic such as bewitchment, powerful weapons from soulslike weaponry, and infinite exploration with ad astra, i created this modpack because there were not a whole lot of high quality origins servers around and i wanted to deliver a better, and more free experience for players, but this modpack can also be used for fun solo origins gameplay**

![FrontierMC](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1159783773026648116/1166078053454188604/frontiermctitlecard.png?ex=65492dd0&is=6536b8d0&hm=6b59c62e0a3d9d1587be4e244f13c362df8160993f0590a1f231539bcde81898&=&width=1440&height=219) ![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg) ![fabric-api](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg) [![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://discord.gg/NQ6YzNft2n)
we also have soulsike weaponry https://modrinth.com/mod/mariums-soulslike-weaponry
